title: languas glabra
intro: Languas glabra, also known as Langkau, is a type of plant native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the ginger family (Zingiberaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Languas glabra include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve nausea and vomiting, and reduce fever. The plant is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and its rhizome is used in herbal remedies, while its leaves and stems are sometimes used in traditional cooking.
